title: [중간 점검] 1~3주차 누적 복습
instruction: 1~3주차 내용을 총동원하여 다음 문장을 분석하고 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: Reading books is a good way to broaden your perspective.

answer.analysis: Reading books(S) is(V) a good way(C) [형용사적] to broaden your perspective.

problems.stem: The students studying in the library seem to be preparing for an exam.

answer.analysis: 것은 당신의 시야를 넓히는 좋은 방법이다. The students(S) [형용사적] studying in the library seem(V) [명사적] to be preparing for an exam(C).
answer.translation: 도서관에서 공부하고 있는 학생들은 시험을 준비하고 있는 것 같다.

problems.stem: He went to the post office to send a package to his family.

answer.analysis: He(S) went(V) (to the post office) [부사적] to send a package to his family.

problems.stem: The movie, based on a true story, made many people cry.

answer.analysis: 를 보내기 위해 우체국에 갔다. The movie(S), [부사적] based on a true story, made(V) many people(O) cry(OC).

problems.stem: My plan is to travel around Europe for a month after graduation.

answer.analysis: 그 영화는 많은 사람들을 울게 만들었다. My plan(S) is(V) [명사적] to travel around Europe for a month after graduation(C).

problems.stem: The problem is too difficult for me to solve alone.

answer.analysis: 후에 한 달 동안 유럽을 여행하는 것이다. The problem(S) is(V) too difficult(C) (for me) [부사적] to solve alone.

problems.stem: Not receiving any answer, I decided to call him directly.

answer.analysis: 너무 어렵다. [부사적] Not receiving any answer, I(S) decided(V) [명사적] to call him directly.

problems.stem: The most effective method to learn English is to use it every day.

answer.analysis: 해서, 나는 그에게 직접 전화하기로 결정했다. The most effective method(S) [형용사적] to learn English is(V) [명사적] to use it every day(C).

problems.stem: She was disappointed to hear the news of the concert's cancellation.

answer.analysis: 어를 배우는 가장 효과적인 방법은 그것을 매일 사용하는 것이다. She(S) was(V) disappointed(C) [부사적] to hear the news of the concert's cancellation.

problems.stem: The products made in Korea are known for their high quality.

answer.analysis: 서트 취소 소식을 듣게 되어 실망했다. The products(S) [형용사적] made in Korea are known(V) (for their high quality).
